name: consumption trace: each consulted source records its content_hash from the cached fetch (per §2.8 standards_state.<source>.content_hash)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && echo "google body" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/google-tsguide.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted google-tsguide --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep -E "content_hash.*sha256:[a-f0-9]" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
